name: @concept-mcp/server
description: MCP stdio server for concept conflict validation.

scripts.prebuild: npm --workspace @concept-mcp/core run build && npm --workspace @concept-mcp/storage-file run build && npm --workspace @concept-mcp/storage-sqlite run build
scripts.precheck: npm --workspace @concept-mcp/core run build && npm --workspace @concept-mcp/storage-file run build && npm --workspace @concept-mcp/storage-sqlite run build
scripts.predev: npm --workspace @concept-mcp/core run build && npm --workspace @concept-mcp/storage-file run build && npm --workspace @concept-mcp/storage-sqlite run build
